description_long: This is a modern, slim laptop with a metallic silver-gray chassis and a large, high-resolution display. The screen features thin bezels on all sides, maximizing the visible area and giving it a contemporary look. The keyboard is backlit and features a standard QWERTY layout with a spacious trackpad below. The lid is smooth with a centered, engraved brand logo, and the overall build appears to be made from aluminum or a similar metal. The laptop is lightweight and portable, suitable for use in urban environments such as cafes, offices, or public spaces. No visible stickers or decorative elements are present, and the ports are not clearly visible from the provided views.
description: A sleek, metallic silver-gray laptop with a thin-bezel display, backlit keyboard, and a smooth, logo-engraved lid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open laptop with a vibrant screen displaying a beach wallpaper, thin bezels, and a full keyboard with trackpad.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the laptop's slim profile and the open screen; keyboard and trackpad are partially visible.
description_view_2: Top-down view of the closed laptop lid, displaying a smooth metallic surface with a centered engraved logo.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the slim profile, open screen, and partial keyboard and trackpad.
attribute_brand_logo: A centered, engraved logo is visible on the top lid, reading 'HUAWEI' in uppercase letters, with a simple, sans-serif font and no additional graphics.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying a colorful wallpaper with a beach and ocean scene.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard is a standard QWERTY layout with a function row and no numeric keypad; keys are black with white markings.
